title: Day 9 Lesson 2 ( Video )Asking someone-s birthplace
html:
Day 9 - Lesson 2

しゅっしんち　に　ついて　きく　(shusshinchi ni tsuite kiku)  = Asking someone's birthplace

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　(kyooshitsu) = School's lobby

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい　ふたり  (gaksee hutari) = Two students

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
